text: He who commits violence or does not give what is due, and on being asked, acts with wickedness, should be summoned by the king's command. // K_103 //
After presenting the case to the king and when the matter is undisputed and has been promised, one may then apply a legal restraint until the summons is seen. // K_104 //
A person liable to legal restraint who, having been restrained, absconds, deserves punishment. // K_105 //
